title: banksia horrida
intro: Banksia horrida, also known as the Prickly Banksia, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Banksia, native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Banksia horrida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea or tincture, and its leaves and cones are dried to be used in infusions, with the cones also being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
